---
title: "skill_forge.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\skills\skill_forge.py"
loc: 227
complexity: 29
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.75
intel_score: 6.51
overall_score: 1.90
---

## Intent
The `skill_forge.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SkillForge, __init__, forge, analyze_pattern, select_archetype, _extract_subject, _generate_workflow_steps, _generate_workflow_template, _generate_test_template, _generate_scanner_template, _generate_utility_template, _generate_scraper_template, synthesize_skill, validate_skill, _save_draft, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SkillForge, __init__, forge, analyze_pattern, select_archetype, _extract_subject, _generate_workflow_steps, _generate_workflow_template, _generate_test_template, _generate_scanner_template, _generate_utility_template, _generate_scraper_template, synthesize_skill, validate_skill, _save_draft, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [py_compile](file://py_compile)
- [re](file://re)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [cortex](file://cortex)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)
- [argparse](file://argparse)

### Exports
- `SkillForge`
- `__init__`
- `forge`
- `analyze_pattern`
- `select_archetype`
- `_extract_subject`
- `_generate_workflow_steps`
- `_generate_workflow_template`
- `_generate_test_template`
- `_generate_scanner_template`
- `_generate_utility_template`
- `_generate_scraper_template`
- `synthesize_skill`
- `validate_skill`
- `_save_draft`
- `main`
